description: N.U.T.S — the Nevada Union Theatre Society — is a student theatre organization at Nevada Union in Grass Valley. Its programs include drama classes, Comedy Sportz, and theatre productions.
Auric Adornments is a gallery and studio space at 470 Auburn St in Grass Valley.

Grass Valley Sign is a full-service sign company, 'specialists in truck lettering, vehicle wraps and digital printing.' Locally owned and operated since 1984, it also makes outdoor and indoor signs, custom banners, and window art.

Mountain Event Productions handles 'all things digital audio & video presentations' from its Nevada City base. Services run from event and tribute video production to DJ sets, video transfers, and audio-visual rentals for conferences.

The Real Graphic Source is a full-service graphics and printing shop in Grass Valley. It handles screen-printed apparel, blueprint reproduction, large-format banners and posters, giclee fine-art reproduction, scanning, and signage.
An Inner Sanctum is a performing-arts listing at 308 Broad St in Nevada City.

KVMRx is a community DJ-driven radio station at 105.7 FM serving Grass Valley and Nevada City — 'On The Dial > Off The Hook.' Volunteer-run and tied to parent station KVMR, its shows range from alt, punk, and experimental to electronic, hip-hop, funk, and soul.

Nevada County Media is a community media hub and production facility in Grass Valley where members can 'create, collaborate, and learn.' It produces the local news program Nevada County Now and offers workshops, equipment access, and rentable production facilities.
Sans Backup Plan Records is a performing-arts spot on Zion Street in Nevada City, featured in MUSE's 'Rural is the New Cool.'
Toad Hall Books is a book shop at 108 N Pine St in Nevada City.
Juxtartstudios is an art studio and gallery space at 406 Nimrod St in Nevada City.
The Vault @ Crush is a gallery space at 211 Broad Street in Nevada City.
Abstrakt is a maker's shop at 228 Broad St in Nevada City.
Bamboo Home Store is a home goods shop at 114 E Main St in Grass Valley.
Crystal Rainbow Rock Shop is a rock and crystal shop at 310 Commercial St in Nevada City.

Field Day Apparel sells sustainable, 'Made in California' women's clothing from its Nevada City showroom on Broad Street. The line is 'ethically made' in Oakland, with 'inclusive sizing' and — as the shop puts it — 'pockets for everyone.'

Grass Valley Games is a tabletop game store on Mill Street that calls itself 'more than just your local neighborhood game store.' Shelves hold board games, Magic and Pokémon cards, miniatures, comics, and RPGs, with tables set aside as 'a relaxing place to play them and meet other gamers.'
J.J. Jackson's is a shop at 244 Commercial St in Nevada City.
LaTeDa is a shop at 138 Mill St in Grass Valley.

Mama Madrone's Eco-Emporium fills its Broad Street storefront in Nevada City with 'ethically sourced products made with sustainable practices from around the world.' The shop carries clothing, body care, housewares, jewelry, and kids' toys, and 'proudly supports many of our local artisans.'
Mountain Pastimes has sold toys, games, kites, and puzzles on Spring Street in Nevada City since 1989. The shop even offers a virtual 3D tour on its website.
Novak's Menswear is a men's clothing shop at 305 Broad St in Nevada City.
SoulCrafts is a maker's shop at 236 Commercial St in Nevada City.
Tribal Weaver is a shop at 105 Mill St in Grass Valley.
Yabobo is a shop at 107 N. Pine Street in Nevada City.
Back in the Day is a shop at 120 Mill St in Grass Valley.
BobbieMoon Video is a video maker listed on the Nevada County cultural map; location details are still being confirmed.

Mountain Gazette is an outdoor culture magazine founded in 1966 and revived in 2020 — 'the craft brewery of outdoor media.' Published twice a year in oversized 11x17 format, it pairs long-form journalism with big photography of mountain life.

Tahoe Truckee Media is an 'Educational and Governmental (EG) access media center' run through the Tahoe Truckee Unified School District. Its channels broadcast public meetings and district events, reaching '14,000 homes in Truckee, Tahoe City, the West Shore of Lake Tahoe, and parts of Placer and Nevada Counties.'

9848.Gallery is an artist-run gallery inside the Truckee Artist Lofts on Donner Pass Road. Resident artists rotate solo and group shows in painting, mosaics, and illustration, alongside open mics for narrative, poetry, and song.
Ridgeline Gallery is an art gallery on Donner Pass Road in Truckee, featured in MUSE's 'Mountain Heart. Small-Town Soul.'
Dressed Boutique is a clothing shop on Donner Pass Road in Truckee.

Kalifornia Jean Bar is a clothing boutique on Donner Pass Road in Truckee, with a sister store in Napa. Racks mix curated designer denim, dresses, and accessories with the shop's in-house 'Tahoe Soul' collection.
Tahoe Mountain Life is a shop at 10120 Jibboom St in Truckee.
Whim Be Beautiful is a fashion boutique on Penn Valley Drive in Penn Valley, stocking 'amazing new fashion finds.'
Elevation Escape offers escape-room games at 12047 Donner Pass Rd in Truckee.
A public sculpture stands at Western Gateway Park, 18560 Penn Valley Dr in Penn Valley.
